name: xColors
description: Generate random colors and convert values among HEX, RGB, and HSL color models.

tools.name: generate_random_color
tools.description: Generate one or more random colors in HEX, RGB, and HSL formats.

params.name: number
params.description: Number of random colors to return; the service defaults to one.

tools.name: generate_color_shade
tools.description: Generate random colors constrained by hue and optional lightness type.

params.name: hue
params.description: A supported color name, the value all, or a numeric hue from 0 through 359.

params.name: number
params.description: Number of random colors to return; the service defaults to one.

params.name: type
params.description: Optional shade filter: dark or light.

tools.name: convert_hex_to_rgb
tools.description: Convert a hexadecimal color value to RGB.

params.name: value
params.description: Six-character hexadecimal color value without the leading #.

tools.name: convert_rgb_to_hex
tools.description: Convert an RGB color value to hexadecimal.

params.name: value
params.description: Red, green, and blue components separated by hyphens, such as 120-200-30; each component must be at most 255.
